song.title: Jesus, Lord, Your our First Love
song.presentation: v1 v2 c v3 v4 c
song.lyrics:
[v1] Jesus Lord, You’re our first love. You’re the One we love the best. When our heart is loving You How we’re filled with Your sweet rest.
[v2] Lord, we love You for Yourself Not for what You give or do. Nothing else could e’re compare With the joy of loving You.
[c] Lord we’ve been drawn off by many things Now we turn our heart back, how it sings! We repent of loving other things Jesus Lord, You’re our first love.
[v3] Never more could we desire Any thing that’s less than You. And to this we will aspire… Simply to be filled with You.
[v4] Jesus Lord, You’re our first love, You’re the One we love the best. When our heart is loving You, How we’re filled with Your sweet rest.
